    Featured Work

    A sample of my recent work across different interests and skillsets. Click below to view more details about each project.

    Recommendation Systems

    Spotify New Song Recommender

    A machine learning recommender that suggests newly released Spotify tracks based on listening history and song similarity.

    Tools Used
    • Python
    • Spotify API
    • pandas
    • LightGBM
    • Plotly
    Pricing & Forecasting

    NBA Ticket Demand Forecasting

    A forecasting and pricing project that estimates NBA ticket demand and recommends how prices should move before each game.

    Tools Used
    • Python
    • pandas
    • XGBoost
    • statsmodels
    • scikit-learn
    Data Science

    Airbnb NYC Pricing Analysis

    An analysis of what drives Airbnb prices in New York City and how accurately listing prices can be predicted from listing features.

    Tools Used
    • R
    • tidyverse
    • ggplot2
    • caret
    • R Markdown

    View All Projects

    About

    I am a Georgia Tech M.S. Analytics student in the Computational Data Science track with a Bachelor's of Science in Applied Mathematics and Statistics from Stony Brook University. I primarily work in Python, R, and SQL for my projects, and right now, I am working on upskilling myself in data visualization, machine learning, and deep learning. I am passionate about using data to solve real-world problems and make a positive impact on society.

    I am seeking data science, analytics, and machine learning internship or full-time opportunities.

    Education

    Georgia Institute of Technology - Atlanta, Georgia

    • M.S. Analytics, Computational Data Science Track
    • Expected May 2027

    Stony Brook University - Stony Brook, New York

    • B.S. Applied Mathematics & Statistics
    • Graduated May 2025
